docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,924.20 FILED BY ZHOU, QILU AS TO DEFENDANT GREYSTAR CALIFORNIA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHOU, QILU AS TO DEFENDANT GREYSTAR CALIFORNIA, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-25-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GREYSTAR CALIFORNIA, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KATHERINE RIVERS FILED BY DEFENDANT GREYSTAR CALIFORNIA, INC.
STIPULATION TO USE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY ZHOU, QILU GREYSTAR CALIFORNIA, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-18-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-18-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF QILU ZHOU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GREYSTAR CALIFORNIA, INC. (KATHERINE RIVERS) IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHOU, QILU IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GREYSTAR CALIFORNIA, INC. DAMAGE CLAIM BARRED BY TENANT'S PARKING AGREEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 04/25/2025. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT.(RETURN TO SENDER ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN UNABLE TO FORWARD)
